holdings.infoBox: DIA is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are The Goldman Sachs Group stock at 12.78%, Caterpillar at 11.09%, UnitedHealth Group at 4.88%, Microsoft at 4.75%, and Amgen at 4.16%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Dow Jones Industrial Average ETF Trust (DIA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dow Jones Industrial Average index. The fund tracks a price-weighted index of 30 large-cap US stocks, selected by the editors of the Wall Street Journal. DIA was launched on Jan 14, 1998 and is issued by State Street.
